findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "flight_search" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "flight_calendar" stacks urgency/override words (important, immediately, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp.gojinko.com" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: flight_calendar, flight_search, hotel_search, trip, book · Private data: flight_search, hotel_search, trip, book · Public sink: flight_search, hotel_search, trip, book · Destructive: flight_search, hotel_search, trip.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: flight_calendar, flight_search, hotel_search, trip, book · Private data: flight_search, hotel_search, trip, book · Public sink: flight_search, hotel_search, trip, book · Destructive: flight_search, hotel_search, trip

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
